title: F&B Bio Recyclage Ltd, a project development company based in Ghana, has announced the launch of a pioneering initiative to convert municipal solid waste into Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF). This milestone project reflects the companyâ€™s strong focus on sustainability and its commitment to lowering the aviation industryâ€™s carbon emissions. The project will be developed in collaboration with strategic partners, including technology providers, waste management firms, and players in the aviation sector. The initial stages will include a standardized Pre-FEED (Front-End Engineering Design) study to assess the technical and financial feasibility of the proposed solution.
